use_case: Zero-shot image classification and image-text similarity scoring
notes: Dual encoder architecture; image encoder processes 224x224 patches while text encoder processes tokenized captions. Both outputs share a common 768-d projection space.
quick_start:
from transformers import CLIPProcessor, CLIPModel
processor = CLIPProcessor.from_pretrained('openai/clip-vit-large-patch14')
model = CLIPModel.from_pretrained('openai/clip-vit-large-patch14')

use_case: Supervised image classification with fine-tuned ImageNet weights
notes: Pure vision transformer with 24 layers and 16x16 patch embeddings. Requires 224x224 input and benefits from standard image preprocessing including resizing and normalization.
quick_start:
from transformers import ViTImageProcessor, ViTForImageClassification
processor = ViTImageProcessor.from_pretrained('google/vit-large-patch16-224')
model = ViTForImageClassification.from_pretrained('google/vit-large-patch16-224')

use_case: End-to-end object detection without hand-designed anchor boxes
notes: Detection Transformer using bipartite matching loss. Processes images through a ResNet-50 backbone and an object queries decoder. Trained on COCO with 91 object classes.
quick_start:
from transformers import DetrImageProcessor, DetrForObjectDetection
processor = DetrImageProcessor.from_pretrained('facebook/detr-resnet-50')
model = DetrForObjectDetection.from_pretrained('facebook/detr-resnet-50')
